command: Click on the Maestro app in the dock. Wait 2 seconds. Click on 'Magic Puffs' in the left sidebar. Wait 2 seconds. Click the panel toggle button in the top right of the Maestro window. Wait 2 seconds. Click the 'Auto Run' tab in the right panel. Wait 2 seconds. Click the 'Run' button. Wait 2 seconds. Click the 'Go' button in the dialog that appears.
description: Start Magic Puffs - slow with waits
